testcase.name: Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > API Response Structure > should return posts with comments field at root level
testcase.system-out: Post structure: { id: 'prod-post-780cce10-57fc-4031-96db-d9f0e15e3010', hasCommentsField: true, commentsValue: 0, hasEngagement: false, engagementComments: undefined }

testcase.name: Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > API Response Structure > should return comments as a number (not undefined)
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > API Response Structure > should include comments count in newly created posts
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > Component Data Flow > should render comment counts from API data
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > Component Data Flow > should update counter when post data changes
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > State Management > should maintain consistent comment counts across re-renders
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > State Management > should reflect API data accurately without transformation
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > Real-world Scenarios > should handle posts with zero comments
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > Real-world Scenarios > should handle posts with multiple comments
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > Real-world Scenarios > should handle API errors gracefully
Comment Counter - Integration Tests (Real API) > Performance > should handle large datasets efficiently
